subject: Your $100M Journal (Secret Project)
body:
Mozination -

I have a promise to deliver on.

For the last 4 years, I've been working on a secret project and I promised that for anyone who showed up live and believed in me - I was going to give it away for free.

And so here it is:

The $100M Journal

(*It might take a couple of seconds to load because of how big it is)

Over the last four years, I've been carefully collecting the notes from my last two books.

I spent countless hours curating these notes in a digestible way so you can get a "behind the scenes" of how frameworks like the Value Equation came to be.

There are over 278 pages of frameworks. Which includes all the drawings, iterations, and some private videos to show you how they were made.

Think of it as a bonus director's cut. Now all yours.

And so - thank you for attending live - and believing in me. Please consider this a small token of my appreciation.

As always, I value your attention and goodwill above else.

I hope you get value inside.

Your #1 fan,

Alex.

PS - Remember your other free goodies:

Gift 1: $100M Leads Course

Gift 2: $100M Leads Book Podcast

Important Update:

If you would like a physical copy, go here while you can

(The first 2/3rd sold out in the first 20 minutes).
